modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to add feedback to a knowledge article.

full_description_text: User wants to give feedback on an article. They don't know how to do it. They are looking for a way to add their comments. This is causing some confusion during the call.
short_description: Unable to add feedback to a knowledge article.
description: User wants to give feedback on an article. They don't know how to do it. They are looking for a way to add their comments. This is causing some confusion during the call.
